From: Jcs Personal
Sent: Mon 15/09/2025 9:35:25 AM (UTC)
To: Jcs Personal
Ce: Michael Roberts Personal : Jes
Personal
Subject: RE: 2025-09-15 Special Handling Case - OSP
Jcs

Thanks — | would like:

First vetting interview

Second vetting interview

VO AOC

CA AOC

Referee interview or written testimony
Supervisor interview or written testimony
My NO | attached to the case

| Head of Personnel Security Team
Cluster 4 Security, Estates Security and Resilence Department, ESND

Personal Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, King Charles St |
London | SW1A 2AH
Telephone: Personal | email: Personal

AZ Guidance - Developed Vetting (DV) and Security Check (SC) clearances (sharepoint.com)
From: Jes

Sent: 15 September 2025 10:26
JCS

To:

Cc: Michael Roberts ; Jcs

Subject: 2025-09-15 Special Handling Case - OSP
Morning Jes

| understand that you have requested access to Lord Mandelson's case. In order to
keep this locked down | would suggest it is best for me to email you directly with the
documents that you would like to see. Please can you therefore send me a list and |
will extract these from the case for you and send them over asap.

Best regards

Special Handling Vetting Manager

UKSV. Government Security Group (GSG), Cabinet Office
Email: Personal

NSV Privacy Notice.

86
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: 2025-09-15 Special Handling Case - OSP
